text:

Author: asomers

Log:
  sysutils/fusefs-libs: don't install irrelevant man pages

  Don't install man pages for programs that the port doesn't install.

  Reviewed by:	emaste
  Approved by:	se (maintainer timeout)
  Sponsored by:	The FreeBSD Foundation
